title: Add dependency integrity verification and supply chain hardening
source: OWASP Agentic ASI04 Supply Chain Compromise
description: try/except ImportError fallbacks silently downgrade security when security_utils.py unavailable. No integrity verification of own components or claude CLI binary.
proposed_changes: Add verify_module_integrity() checking SHA-256 hashes. Change ImportError fallbacks to print CRITICAL warnings and set SECURITY_DEGRADED flag. Add security-check subcommand.
